project.name: Acme API (example)
project.summary: A worked example showing the trace-spec shape. Two use cases share several objects, which is the point: tracing flows teaches you what each object is for far better than an import map does.

use_cases.name: A user logs in with email and password
use_cases.summary: Watch control bounce across layers: route to service to data to security and back. That bounce is the real shape of the request.

steps.does: Parses the POST body, pulls out email and password
Orchestrates the check and decides pass or fail
steps.detail: Coordinates the next three steps. Returns a User on success or raises InvalidCredentials, which the route turns into a 401.

steps.does: Runs a SELECT by email, returns a User or None
Constant-time compare against the stored bcrypt hash
Signs a JWT carrying the user id and an expiry
Serializes the token to JSON and sets the cookie

use_cases.name: A signed-in user places an order
use_cases.summary: Reuses TokenService and UserRepository from the login flow, then adds the order-specific objects.

steps.does: Parses the cart payload from the request body
Validates the JWT and extracts the user id
Fetches the user row for ownership and limits
Validates the cart, computes totals, applies tax
Calls the payment provider, returns a charge id
INSERTs the order and line items in one transaction
Serializes the saved order to JSON, status 201

use_cases.name: A client refreshes an expiring token
use_cases.summary: Shows an object whose traced code spans two files: TokenService.rotate() is inherited from a base class in a different module, so the objects index draws a per-file mini-map for it.

steps.does: Reads the existing refresh token from the request
Confirms the token is well-formed and unexpired
Invalidates the old token and mints a replacement
steps.detail: rotate() is not defined in token_service.py — it's inherited from BaseTokenService in app/security/base_token.py. The trace points at where the code actually runs, which is why TokenService shows up under two files in the objects index.

steps.does: Serializes the fresh token to JSON
